parts.text: The user wants to check the 'profit brain' system status, so I'll run diagnostic commands to check running processes, disk space, and memory usage.

args.command: ps aux | grep -E "(ollama|live-soul|telegram_bot|autonomous|djinie|deerg|doctor|library|bot-commander)" | grep -v grep | wc -l && ps aux | grep -E "(ollama|live-soul|telegram_bot|autonomous|djinie|deerg|doctor|library|bot-commander)" | grep -v grep
curl -s http://localhost:11434/api/tags 2>/dev/null | head -20 || echo "Ollama not responding"

parts.text: Need to check the fix-us repo status and verify if the live-soul-master script exists since the process isn't running.

args.command: cd ~/fix-us && git log --oneline -5 2>/dev/null && echo "---" && ls -la ~/fix-us/ 2>/dev/null | head -20
